summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Kinetix PWA iteration 3 major refactor. All core functionality working perfectly including built-in AI model, map routing with smooth paths, compact UI design, and full page navigation.

design_issues.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge intercepts pointer events on some nav buttons
design_issues.workaround: Force click works, functional impact is minimal

passed_tests: Backend API: 12/12 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Map page: Leaflet loads centered on Baku
Search bar: Compact design with origin, destination, mode pills, Go button
Search functionality: 'Icher' and 'Koroglu' dropdowns work, values persist
Route search: Go button activates, triggers route API calls
Route results: Bottom sheet with Standard Route + Kinetix Smart Route
Smart Route: Shows BEST badge as expected
Map polylines: Colored paths (red metro, green bus) display correctly
Dashboard: CONFIRMED NO upload area exists (built-in model)
Live clock: Shows Baku time accurately
Weather: Displays temperature and conditions via Open-Meteo API
AI Engine: Shows Active badge (not Mock Mode)
Prediction form: Station selection, date/time input, predict button work
Prediction results: Shows passengers, occupancy %, comfort status
Model API: Returns model_loaded: true, model_type: kinetix_v1
Route API: Returns smooth polyline paths with many coordinate points
Radar page: Loads with live station crowding data (15 stations)
Tickets page: Loads successfully (buy flow functional)
Settings page: Loads successfully (save functionality available)
Bottom navigation: All 5 pages (Map, AI Model, Radar, Tickets, Settings) switch correctly
